description:
Half-Life Advanced Effects (HLAE) is a tool to enrich Source (mainly CS:GO) engine based movie making.


- Included AfxHookSource2 0.39.0 (2026-05-06T13:41Z)
AfxHookSource2 0.39.0 (2026-05-06T13:41Z)
- Fixed multi stream recordings crash
- mirv-script: updated boa to 1.0.0-dev (da570fd)
- mirv-script: reworked hooks to be mirv.events.xxxxx to handle conflicts, thanks to @wuXinnnn for initial ideas/discussions. See updated examples (some examples are also in the first message of the pull request)
